releases.label: Brominated plastics burned or dumped
releases.note: UNEP estimates these flame-retardant plastics are released each year through unsafe handling.

releases.label: Lead released
releases.note: Lead exposure pushes neurological and developmental risks into workers and nearby communities.

releases.label: Cadmium released
releases.note: Cadmium contamination adds to long-term soil and water toxicity around informal processing sites.

releases.label: Mercury released
releases.note: Even small mercury volumes create severe risks where handling, burning, and disposal are uncontrolled.

healthFindings.label: Increase in neonatal mortality near major sites
healthFindings.note: A 2024 World Bank Economic Review found strong mortality effects for children living close to e-waste sites.

healthFindings.label: Increase in infant mortality near major sites
healthFindings.note: The same study linked e-waste site exposure to significantly higher infant mortality.

healthFindings.label: Lag before effects appear
healthFindings.note: The delay is consistent with contamination accumulating gradually in surrounding environments.
